conflicts.description: Chapter 1 introduces Sadie Kincaid's daughters as Lena Kincaid and Bess Holt, but the hearing chapter and later fallout identify the same dispute pair as Hester and Pearl (later Pearl Lusk).
conflicts.canonical_value: Sadie's claimants are Hester (older Kincaid-line daughter) and Pearl (younger Dunn-line daughter, later referred to as Pearl Lusk).
conflicts.resolution_note: The Hester/Pearl version is embedded in the hearing's legal logic and Pearl's later role in the child-row scandal, so it is harder to change without rewriting multiple later scenes. Chapter 1's Lena/Bess naming reads like stale residue and is not carried forward.

conflicts.description: Chapters 6, 13, and 15 agree Gabriel had a healed left-collarbone break, but disagree on the accident details: a chestnut in the orchard, a sorrel at the creek road, or a half-broke mule at an orchard gate.
conflicts.canonical_value: Gabriel carried an old healed left-collarbone break from a pre-story orchard-area riding/work accident; the exact animal and mechanics remain unspecified in canon.
conflicts.resolution_note: The healed break itself is the causally important detail used to identify Gabriel later. Because the specific accident variant is inconsistent across chapters and less continuity-critical, the sheet keeps only the stable injury fact.
